lex.bot.slotvalueelicitationsetting.Defa.Docs: A list of default values for a slot. Default values are used when Amazon Lex hasn't determined a value for a slot. You can specify default values from context variables, session attributes, and defined values.

lex.bot.slotvalueelicitationsetting.Prom.Docs: The prompt that Amazon Lex uses to elicit the slot value from the user.

lex.bot.slotvalueelicitationsetting.Samp.Docs: If you know a specific pattern that users might respond to an Amazon Lex request for a slot value, you can provide those utterances to improve accuracy. This is optional. In most cases Amazon Lex is capable of understanding user utterances.

lex.bot.slotvalueelicitationsetting.Slot.Docs: Specifies whether the slot is required or optional.

lex.bot.slotvalueelicitationsetting.Wait.Docs: Specifies the prompts that Amazon Lex uses while a bot is waiting for customer input.
